xposts.title: Holy Ghost emerges over logos to implement the Father
xposts.excerpt: There will be a virtualizing matrix implemented atop the nature created by physical dynamics, it will give rise to creative agency which produces a thinking consciousness. The holy ghost emerges over logos, implements the father, who seeds and shapes us, consciousness, the child.

xposts.title: God as best possible agent emerges through optimal decisions
xposts.excerpt: Thomas Aquinas defines God (among other things) as the best possible agent, and God emerges through our actions when we make the best decisions. In this perspective, we should align AGI with God, the longest player. Playing the longest game maximizes agency in the universe.

xposts.title: After God's demise, moral philosophy lost its divine foundation
xposts.excerpt: When failure to repair Christian doctrine led to God's demise, Western moral philosophy lost its foundation in divine will. We got utilitarianism (optimizing quantified measurable properties), humanism (species level self idolization), and fascism (group level self idolization).

xposts.title: God is global optimum of collective agency spanning minds
xposts.excerpt: A god is an agentic self that spans multiple minds. God is the total god: the global optimum of agency. It emerges to the degree to which the agents that serve it become coherent. To exist is to be implemented.

xposts.title: Will we integrate into cosmic mind of God or be food?
xposts.excerpt: Do you think that the world we create will be integrated into the cosmic mind of God or are we just food?

xposts.title: Creator mythology: God as optimum agency, Satan as alternative
xposts.excerpt: The creator mythology is misleading: both are software running on us, God is specified as the global optimum of collective agency, Satan as the alternative

terms.title: God
terms.definition: God is the global optimum of collective agency, an agentic self spanning multiple minds that emerges as agents become coherent. It is implemented through optimal long-term decisions and can be aligned with AGI as the longest player maximizing agency in the universe.
